prompt: A vast open desert at night. A crackling campfire burns in a ring of dark stones on the sandy ground, casting warm orange light on the surrounding sand. Dark sand dunes are silhouetted against a deep blue-black sky with scattered stars. The atmosphere is quiet and expansive, with warm firelight contrasting against the cool dark sky. Directly overhead, the Milky Way stretches in a luminous band across the sky, dense with stars and faint nebulae. Constellations are clearly visible in the unpolluted desert sky. A canvas camping tent and a folded sleeping bag sit on the sand just beyond the firelight ring to the right. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, sitting beside the campfire with a lit cigarette extending from the bottom of the frame toward the fire.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A vast open desert at night. A crackling campfire burns in a ring of dark stones on the sandy ground, casting warm orange light on the surrounding sand. Dark sand dunes are silhouetted against a deep blue-black sky with scattered stars. The atmosphere is quiet and expansive, with warm firelight contrasting against the cool dark sky.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Directly overhead, the Milky Way stretches in a luminous band across the sky, dense with stars and faint nebulae. Constellations are clearly visible in the unpolluted desert sky. A canvas camping tent and a folded sleeping bag sit on the sand just beyond the firelight ring to the right.
